{
  "verdict": "REFUTED",
  "reason": "The finding claims a PII exfiltration path from files-api.md to batches.md, but there is no actual data flow between these skills. The files-api.md skill manages file uploads and retrieval (returning file_id strings), while batches.md creates batch API requests with hardcoded message content (climate change, quantum computing, product classifications). The file_id from files-api.md is never referenced, passed, or used in any batches.md request—they operate independently with no shared context or variable linkage.",
